title: The Cantonments (Extension of Rent Control Laws) Act, 1957
full_text: The Cantonments (Extension of Rent Control Laws) Act, 1957 छावनी (किराया नियंत्रण विधियों का विस्‍तार)अधिनियम,1957 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195746 Act Number: 46 Enactment Date: 1957-12-18 Act Year: 1957 Short Title: The Cantonments (Extension of Rent Control Laws) Act, 1957 Hindi Title: छावनी (किराया नियंत्रण विधियों का विस्‍तार)अधिनियम,1957 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension to cantonments of laws relating to the control of rent and regulation of house accommodation. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Defence Enforcement Date: 26-01-1950 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Cantonments (Extension of Rent Control Laws) Act, 1957 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to extend to cantonments laws relating to control of rents and regulation of house accommodation. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Extension of the Madhya Bharat Accommodation Control Act, 1955 to the cantonment of Mhow.
